action: Climbed to the eastern cliff before sunrise and sat there alone, watching the horizon.
thought: Woke up 5am, couldn't sleep anyway. This cliff is good. Nobody comes here.

action: Started laying the foundation for a second room in his house, just in case.
thought: Eh, space for one more lah. Never know who might need it. Better to have than not have.

action: Slept in until 9am, then walked barefoot down to the shore for a swim.
thought: Salt water, quiet beach, no Slack notifications. This is fine actually.

description: Ryan spotted Marcus on the cliff and waved up at him. Marcus gave a single nod and looked back at the sea.
dialogue: Ryan: 'Eh Marcus! Come down later, I cook dinner! Got extra rice!'

action: Gathered driftwood pieces and arranged them near his tent, working methodically without hurrying.
thought: Dey all doing their own thing, got their plans. That's fine. The work keeps hands busy enough.

action: Walked down to the lagoon searching for fresh water and spotted Jade wading near the shallows.
thought: Walao, this girl also exploring the water side? Maybe can work together on the water problem, make it easier for everyone lah.

action: Drifted along the lagoon edge, letting the cool water run over her arms and testing the reef beneath.
thought: The island doesn't care what we do here. That's what makes it so clean, sia.

description: Ryan approached Jade at the lagoon and pointed out a freshwater stream trickling down the rocks; Jade smiled and said they should both bring water back.
dialogue: Eh Jade, you see that stream? This place is sibeh set-up already, can?

action: Sits at the edge of his tent, listening to the island settle into darkness.
thought: The work kept the noise down. Now it's just in the head again. She was smiling at him like that, eh. Not his problem, not his business.

action: Lies in his house, turning over the day's moments with Jade, already thinking about tomorrow.
thought: She's genuine, that one. Easy to work with. Tomorrow see if can do more together. Steady, don't push it.

action: Settles into her hammock as the stars appear above the lagoon.
thought: No rush, no angle. He's just... there. Present. That's rare one, sia. No expectations at all.

description: As night fell, Ryan walked Jade back toward her hammock and told her they made a solid team on the first day.
dialogue: Ryan: We make a decent team already, la.
